findings.message: Stale derived field: rename_item() updates only item.name without recalculating item.slug, violating the consistency strategy documented in models.py lines 16-17. The slug field is defined as a derived field that 'must stay in sync with name — update both together via repository helpers', but this endpoint bypasses the update_item_name() helper in repository.py that enforces this invariant.
findings.suggestion: Replace the direct update (lines 45-50) with a call to repository.update_item_name(session, item_id, payload.name). Alternatively, add slug = _make_slug(payload.name) immediately after setting item.name to maintain the consistency contract.
